ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Data Export Approval UAE-PDPL/CBT/2026-041 authorised replication of pseudonymised audit events to a GCC regional cluster operated by Azureo Gulf Cloud WLL (BH)
minimisation markers ensured no Emirates ID or family-origin fields left the UAE

must_detect.matched_text:
Systems: The onboarding portal for the Emirate Capital Exchange test environment remained available; workflow queues were paused and resumed without change to data integrity.
PDPL scope: PDPL-covered fields (Emirates ID, trade licence, family origin) are present as form labels in templates only; the records implicated contained placeholders and no identified or indirectly identifiable natural person data.
MNPI: No non-public market-sensitive issuer information was processed; the only deal references were to already-announced timetables under prior SCA disclosures.
DPA/Retention: Per the Data Processing Agreement with Bayt Ajyal Cloud FZ-LLC, Schedule 2 retention rules apply to audit logs (standard 30 days); no retention changes were triggered by this event.
DSAR/Erasure: A DSAR erasure for a closed test profile was completed on 2026-06-01 and verified by the Privacy Office; no further requests are pending.
Cross-border transfer: Data Export Approval UAE-PDPL/CBT/2026-041 authorised replication of pseudonymised audit events to a GCC regional cluster operated by Azureo Gulf Cloud WLL (BH); minimisation markers ensured no Emirates ID or family-origin fields left the UAE.
Consent: A consent-withdrawal toggle exists in CRM templates, but no withdrawals were triggered or processed in relation to this incident.
Identifiers in forms (examples): Emirates ID 000-0000-0000000-0, Trade Licence TL-XYZ-999999, Family Origin (optional) — placeholders only, not live submissions.
Compliance: No notification obligation to the UAE SCA, ADGM Office of Data Protection, or DIFC Commissioner of Data Protection was triggered; the incident is closed as informational.
Market context: Deal workflow references were generic and publicly disclosed; nothing price-sensitive or non-public was handled.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
